## From One-Off Report to Reusable Workflow

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(dplyr)

sales |>
  group_by(region, month) |>
  summarise(
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    orders = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```
:::
